name: SCC_CM_Slac_Parm_Req
title: SCC_CM_Slac_Parm_Req
syntax: void SCC_CM_Slac_Parm_Req ( byte RunId[], byte SourceMacAddress[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a CM_Slac_Parm.Req message is received.
Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with

parameters.name: RunId
parameters.description: Random Run Identifier of sender (8 byte)
